message:
fix(tmux): eliminate TOCTOU race in EnsureSessionFresh (gt-1nfip)

Replace check-then-create pattern with create-first approach. The old code
called HasSession() then NewSession(), leaving a race window where another
agent could create the same session. Now we attempt NewSession() first and
handle ErrSessionExists by checking zombie status. The second NewSession()
after zombie kill also handles the race gracefully.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
